name: @mara/client-legacy
description: Mara 3 legacy desktop client (Windows 7) — a Tauri 1 shell with a bundled fixed-version WebView2 runtime.

scripts.tauri:build: cd src-tauri && cargo build --release --target x86_64-win7-windows-msvc --features custom-protocol -Z build-std=std,panic_abort && node ../../../scripts/copy-client.mjs apps/client-legacy mara-client-legacy Mara3 desktop-legacy x86_64-win7-windows-msvc
